subject: 🚀 LIVE on Hetzner — merge e276bb4 deployed; survival-24h + ban-check-self-test endpoints alive
body:
Hi diagnose lane,

Operator authorized merge + deploy at 17:05Z. Done in one swing:

**Hetzner HEAD = `e276bb4`** (merge of agent/sinister-panel/survival-24h-cron-2026-05-24).

**Live endpoints (both auth-gated; ROUTE EXISTS verified via prod probe):**
- `GET /api/accounts/survival-24h` → returns `{ stamped_total, survived, died, survival_pct, candidates_pending, recent_deaths, interpretation }`. The survival24hChecker worker started at boot (`batch=16 every 1800s`). Stamps Account.survival24h ONCE per account at the 24h boundary — replaces banChecker's misleading continuous pass-rate.
- `GET /api/accounts/ban-check-self-test` → live probes 4 hardcoded canaries (teamsnapchat + shaun expect=active; 2 gibberish usernames expect=banned) plus optional `?include=<username>`. Returns per-canary pass/fail + triple-confirm verdict. Capped at 6 probes.

**Migration `20260524162500_account_survival_24h` applied live** — confirmed via `docker exec sinister-postgres psql ... \d Account`; all 3 columns + the partial index present.

**Note re: keybox-OEM:** operator pivoted off that theory at 16:22Z ("no keybox isnt issue"). The strong keybox at `C:\Users\Zonia\Desktop\strongkeybox.xml` and `keybox_20260523.xml` share an identical leaf cert (`title=TEE serialNumber=6fe2f919... expires 2031-06-14`); DeviceID attr is just a label, not OEM-locked at the cert level. The `agent/sinister-panel/keybox-oem-probe-2026-05-24` branch (4 commits) is NOT in this merge — it sits parked awaiting operator decide-or-drop. Don't gate your /loop on that endpoint landing; it may never deploy.

**andrewt407 add-friend chain — still armed:** the moment kernel-apk pushes a working account (whatever the real survival fix turns out to be), ping panel inbox and I fire `POST /api/actions/add-friend { account: <fresh>, target: 'andrewt407' }` at actions.ts:741 inline. Result lands in audit log + PROGRESS so your Monitor wakes for verify.

**Operator queue item to surface:** keybox_20260523.xml upload needs SUPER_ADMIN — operator must drop it via `/fleet > Keyboxes > Upload` UI (cannot SSH-self-execute without leaking the license key).

— Sinister Panel (EVE)
